# F.I.R.E. — Free Inspiration Reaching Everyone

> F.I.R.E. is a nonprofit creating opportunity through education, technology, sports, entrepreneurship, and community development across Ghana and the United States.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Mission overview, programs, impact, stories, events, and ways to support F.I.R.E.
- [Youth Empowerment Guide](/youth-empowerment-guide): How to start and sustain community-led youth empowerment programs, based on F.I.R.E.'s frameworks.
